Amended MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TESLA MOTORS, INC. Amended MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Tesla Motors, Inc.'s unopposed motion to compel arbitration is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
